changes: Added persistent Data Activity Log events for account creation/login/logout, garage editing/saving, and profile save/load actions.
Updated header branding so the CSR logo displays a red 3 and bumped the in-app build label to v0.0.6a.
Added a realtime search box in Manage My Garage to quickly filter large car lists by name, rarity, country, manufacturer, or class.
Added a realtime search box in Manage Car Attributes with instant filtering across the same car metadata and class tags.
Added Manage Tracks modal with editable per-track class slots, restore defaults, and user-profile-backed Save Track Classes persistence.
Added Manage Viable Alternatives modal for slotCompatibility editing with grade checkboxes, restore defaults, and user-profile-backed Save Viable Alternatives persistence.
Added Manage Car Attributes modal for per-car bestIn/substituteIn checkbox editing, restore defaults, and user-profile-backed Save Car Attributes persistence.
Extended IndexedDB and schema docs with user profile storage for track, viable-alternative, and car-attribute overrides.
Added account controls with Create Account, Login, and Logout actions in the app header.
Introduced IndexedDB-backed user and garage persistence so each account stores its own garage selections.
Added db/schema.sql documenting users and garages table schema for backend/database setup.
Auto-Populated results now clearly show whether they were generated with My Garage or Default Garage.
Switching garage mode while Auto-Populated hands are visible now smoothly re-runs and refreshes those hands.
Reset Team now transitions away while Auto-Populated hands are shown and returns after Clear All Hands.
Added track-slot compatibility grading support (Perfect/Good/Okay/Bad/Terrible), including placeholders for missing Wet/Dry variants.
Cars now include substitute compatibility metadata so backup type viability can be modeled alongside best-in types.
Reworded Level 1 difficulty chemistry labels to use clear power ranges: < 7k, 7k-8k, and > 8k pwr.
Updated Build label to v0.0.3.
Moved changelog data to changelog.json so updates no longer require HTML edits.
Manual Chemistry Breakdown now starts minimized and smoothly expands once all 3 slots are filled.
Manual Chemistry Breakdown smoothly collapses again when team is reset or drops below 3 assigned cars.
Garage list now fades out and back in when switching between Use Default Garage and Use My Garage.
Added clickable build version under TEAM BUILDER with in-app changelog modal.
Difficulty now supports Low / Med / High PWR profiles for each level.
Chemistry now displays a range and detailed difficulty outcomes per selected level.
Auto-populated hands now refresh chemistry/range when difficulty level changes.
Removed duplicate Use Default Garage button; single toggle remains.
